name: Himsagor
description: The king of Rajshahi mangoes. Unmatched sweetness, completely fiberless texture, and an intoxicating aroma that fills the room.

name: Amrupali
description: A hybrid favourite with deep orange fiberless flesh, rich sweetness, and a longer shelf life — perfect for gifting.

name: Langra
description: Famous for retaining its green skin even when perfectly ripe. Extremely juicy with a bold, unique aroma unlike any other variety.

name: Khirshapat
description: One of the most premium and sought-after varieties from Rajshahi. Rich, creamy flavour with a paper-thin skin and honeyed fragrance.

name: Fazli
description: Bangladesh's largest mango variety. Mildly sweet with a gentle fragrance — ideal for large family gatherings and sharing.

name: Gopalbhog
description: An early-season treasure with a distinctive musky sweetness, velvety texture, and a tiny seed that means more flesh for you.
